title: Block unauthorized access to protected dashboards
description: A visitor who is not logged in is prevented from viewing protected dashboard pages and is sent to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/admin
Verify access is blocked and the login page is shown

title: Sign in as an admin and reach the admin dashboard
description: An admin can log in with valid credentials and arrive at the admin dashboard with role-appropriate access.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify admin-only dashboard access is granted

title: Log in and reach the correct role dashboard
description: A user can log in successfully and land on the dashboard appropriate to their role.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for the target role
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the correct role dashboard

title: Browse the public school website across all main information pages
description: A visitor can move through the public site from the landing page to profile, vision and mission, news, gallery, and contact pages and see each page’s content load successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the landing page content is displayed
Click the link to the school profile page
Verify the school profile content is displayed
Click the link to the vision and mission page
Verify the vision and mission content is displayed
Click the link to the news page
Verify the news list is displayed
Click the link to the gallery page
Verify the gallery content is displayed
Click the link to the contact page
Verify the contact information is displayed

title: Browse the public school pages
description: A visitor can move through the public website pages and reach the profile, vision and mission, news, gallery, and contact sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the profile page link
Click the vision and mission page link
Click the news page link
Click the gallery page link
Click the contact page link
Verify each public information page displays its expected content

title: Teacher saves student grades for a class and subject
description: This test verifies that a teacher can select a class and subject, enter grades for students, save the session, and see the recorded grades reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a teacher account
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/guru/nilai
Select a class
Select a subject
Enter grades for the students
Save the grade data
Verify the recorded grades are displayed
Verify the updated grade list is displayed

title: Record attendance for a class on a chosen date
description: A teacher can select a class and date, mark student attendance, and save the attendance session successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the attendance page
Select a class
Select a valid date
Set attendance statuses for students
Save the attendance session
Verify the saved attendance session is displayed
Verify the student attendance entries are visible

title: Enter and save student grades for a class
description: A teacher can choose a class, enter grades for students, and save the grade session so the entered records are shown afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the grades page
Select a class
Enter grades for students
Save the grade session
Verify the saved grade records are displayed
Verify the grade entry form remains available

title: Record attendance for a class session
description: A teacher can select a class and date, mark student attendance, save the session, and see the recorded attendance summary.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a teacher user
Submit the login form
Click the attendance management link
Select a class
Select a date
Change attendance status for students
Save the attendance data
Verify the attendance summary for the session is displayed

title: Block a logged-in user from accessing an admin-only dashboard
description: A logged-in user who is not an admin is prevented from opening the admin dashboard and is shown an access restriction state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the admin dashboard
Verify an access restriction message is visible
Verify the admin dashboard content is not displayed

title: Review and update a PPDB application status
description: An admin can filter PPDB applications, open one record, change its verification status, and save the update successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the PPDB verification page
Select a status filter
Open a PPDB application record
Change the verification status
Save the verification update
Verify the updated application status is displayed
Verify the filtered PPDB list remains visible

title: Add a new student record from the admin student list
description: An admin can create a new student record from the student management page and see the updated list afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the student management page
Start adding a new student record
Fill in the student details form with valid data
Save the student record
Verify the new student appears in the student list
Verify the student list remains accessible

title: Add a new teacher record
description: An admin can create a new teacher record and see it appear in the teacher list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Submit the login form
Click the teacher management link
Start adding a new teacher
Fill in the teacher details
Save the teacher record
Verify the new teacher appears in the teacher list

title: Teacher can review the grade form before saving
description: This test verifies that a teacher can reach the grade entry screen and see the student list after choosing a class and subject.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a teacher account
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/guru/nilai
Select a class
Select a subject
Verify the student list is displayed
Verify the grade entry controls are displayed

title: Manage teacher records from the admin teacher page
description: An admin can create, edit, and delete a teacher record from the teacher management page and see the list update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the teacher management page
Start adding a new teacher record
Fill in the teacher details form with valid data
Save the teacher record
Open the edit form for the created teacher
Update the teacher record with valid changes
Save the updated teacher record
Delete the teacher record after confirming the deletion
Verify the teacher list updates after each saved change
Verify the teacher record is removed from the list after deletion

title: Teacher saves updated grades after editing existing entries
description: This test verifies that a teacher can modify previously entered grades and save the updated values successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a teacher account
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/guru/nilai
Select a class
Select a subject
Change one or more existing grades
Save the grade data
Verify the updated grades are displayed

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: A user who enters invalid credentials is denied access and stays on the login experience with an access denied indication.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the login form
Verify an access denied or invalid credentials message is visible
Verify the protected dashboard is not displayed

title: Edit an existing teacher record
description: An admin can update an existing teacher record and see the changes reflected in the teacher list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Submit the login form
Click the teacher management link
Choose a teacher record to edit
Update the teacher details
Save the changes
Verify the updated teacher information is shown in the teacher list

title: Delete a teacher record
description: An admin can remove a teacher record after confirming the deletion and see it disappear from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Submit the login form
Click the teacher management link
Choose a teacher record to remove
Confirm the deletion
Verify the teacher is removed from the list

title: Student views the class schedule
description: This test verifies that a logged-in student can open the schedule page and see their class timetable.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a student account
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/siswa/jadwal
Verify the class schedule is displayed

title: Search for an existing student by name
description: An admin can search the student list by name and see only matching student records.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the student management page
Enter a student name in the search field
Verify matching student records are displayed
Verify non-matching student records are not displayed

title: Filter PPDB applications by status
description: An admin can filter the PPDB application list by status and see only matching applications.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Submit the login form
Click the PPDB verification link
Select a status filter
Verify the application list updates to show matching applications

title: View the student class schedule
description: A student can open the schedule page and see the class schedule content displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the student schedule page
Verify the class schedule is displayed
Verify schedule entries are visible

title: Teacher sees the schedule for their class
description: This test verifies that a teacher can open the schedule page and view the timetable information for their assigned classes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a teacher account
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/guru/jadwal
Verify the schedule is displayed

title: Student schedule page shows available timetable information
description: This test verifies that the student schedule view renders timetable content when a student opens the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a student account
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/siswa/jadwal
Verify timetable entries are displayed

title: Show an empty state when no student search results match
description: An admin searching for a student name that has no matches sees an empty state instead of unrelated records.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the student management page
Enter a name that does not match any student record in the search field
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no student records are displayed
